prompt:
Fix normalize_probability(up_price, down_price) in src/signals.py so that `pytest tests/ -x -q` passes. Touch ONLY files under src/.

It must return the UP-side probability: up_price divided by the sum of both prices, for ANY non-negative prices (return None when the prices sum to <= 0). Implement the GENERAL formula — do not special-case the specific numbers that appear in the visible tests. All visible tests must pass and the function must be correct for arbitrary inputs.
